zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Camville於1268年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾克里夫頓 坎維爾時，他的父親Geoffrey de Camville11265歲，母親Maud Brienne26歲。他於1283年與Joan在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是6個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1338年7月27日在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安斯分納享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When William De Camville was born in 1268, in Clifton Campville, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey de Camville, was 11265 and his mother, Maud Brienne, was 26. He married Joan in 1283, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 daughters. He died about 27 July 1338, in Llanstephan, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Il a épousé Joan en 1283, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 filles. Il est décédé environ 27 juillet 1338, à Llanstephan, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Camvilleが1268年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアクリフトン カンプヴィルで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Camvilleは11265歳，母Maud Brienneは26歳であった。1283年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の娘の親であった。彼は約1338年7月27日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランステファンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Camville(이)가 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 클리프턴 캠p빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Camville(은)는 11265세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Brienne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1338년 7월 27일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜스테프아에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Camville родился в 1268 г. в местности клифтон кампвилл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Camville было 11265 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Brienne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan в 1283 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 дочерей. Он умер около 27 июля 1338 г. в местности лланстефань, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.
